blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,484 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
